message:
feat(network): add unified timeout/backoff/error taxonomy (ft-e34d9.10.4.3)

Add network_reliability.rs with:
- NetworkErrorKind: transient/permanent/degraded classification
- classify_io_error: maps std::io::ErrorKind to the taxonomy
- TimeoutPolicy: per-subsystem configurable timeouts (8 subsystems)
- RetryPolicy: exponential backoff with jitter (4 presets)
- BackoffCalculator: stateful retry delay computation with
  deterministic pseudo-random jitter
- IoOutcome: wraps raw I/O results with error classification
- ReliabilityConfig: composite timeout + retry per subsystem

41 unit tests + 13 property tests covering:
- Error classification stability and completeness
- Backoff delay bounds (never exceeds max_backoff)
- Retry exhaustion (exactly at max_attempts)
- Reset semantics
- Zero-jitter monotonicity
- Serde roundtrip for all serializable types

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
